action: C4 other phase agents adopt handoff schemas: Intent, Scout, Triage, TDD, Build, Ship — profile gets output_contract, persona gets Output table, agent prompt instructs emit-both (prose .md + handoff JSON). phase-gate.sh validates all 8 phases via handoff-lint.sh (still WARN-only). cycle-digest.json schema bumps 1.1 → 1.2 with per_phase_handoffs[] array aggregated by cycle-health-check.sh. ~400 LoC across 6 personas + 6 profiles + phase-gate + cycle-health-check.sh.
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: C3 (audit+retrospective adoption proves the pattern). Bulk uniformity work. Each persona's Output section gains structured-handoff schema-link table mirroring C3's auditor pattern. cycle-digest.json v1.2 adds per_phase_handoffs[{phase, agent, verdict, cost_usd, tree_sha}] for cross-cycle observability. Anti-goals: no kernel hook changes, no profile permission additions beyond Write(handoff-*.json) for the phases that don't already have it.
